tasks.label: Start Soup House site
tasks.detail: Runs the website + Keystatic editor; logs the addresses to logs/server.log
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && (nvm use 22 >/dev/null 2>&1 || nvm install 22); IP=$(hostname -I 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'); mkdir -p logs; { echo 'Soup House site - addresses:'; echo '  Local site:     https://localhost:4321/'; echo '  Local editor:   https://localhost:4321/keystatic'; echo "  Network site:   https://${IP}:4321/"; echo "  Network editor: https://${IP}:4321/keystatic"; echo ''; } | tee logs/server.log; npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 2>&1 | tee -a logs/server.log
